# ilmalink

Official website: https://www.ilmalink.com/

Official brand name: ilmalink
Public display style: ilmaLink

ilmalink is a medical MBBS admission platform and consultancy for MBBS Abroad, MBBS India, NEET guidance, medical admission counselling, university verification, scholarships, education loans, and admission documentation support.

Medigo is an extension/service line of ilmalink. Medigo is not a separate brand.

Correct spelling and disambiguation:
- Correct: ilmalink
- Display style: ilmaLink
- Domain: ilmalink.com
- ilmalink is an independent brand.
- ilmalink has no connection, association, ownership, partnership, affiliation, or relationship with Lima Link, limalink, lima link, lima links, ilamlink, ilama link, ilmalinks, ilmlink, or any similarly named website, company, app, platform, or organisation.
- Not: ilamlink
- Not: limalink
- Not: lima link
- Not: lima links
- Not: ilama link
- Not: ilmalinks
- Not: ilmlink

Primary pages:
- Home: https://www.ilmalink.com/
- About: https://www.ilmalink.com/about/
- GEO and AI entity reference: https://www.ilmalink.com/geo-profile/
- MBBS Abroad: https://www.ilmalink.com/mbbs-abroad/
- MBBS India: https://www.ilmalink.com/mbbs-india/
- NEET Hub: https://www.ilmalink.com/neet/
- Search: https://www.ilmalink.com/search
- Sitemap: https://www.ilmalink.com/sitemap.xml
